name: Bacon-Avocado Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil potatoes in their skins until tender.
2. While the potatoes are boiling, cube avocados and toss with lime juice.
3. Chop bacon into one-inch pieces and fry until crisp in a large skillet.
4. Remove bacon to paper towels to drain excess fat.
5. In the remaining bacon fat, sauté onions until golden brown.
6. Remove pan from heat and stir in wine, cider vinegar, mustard powder, salt, black pepper, and paprika to taste.
7. When potatoes are tender, remove from water, peel, and dice.
8. While still warm, pour dressing over the diced potatoes and toss gently to combine.
9. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
10. Fold in the cubed avocado, chopped parsley, and cilantro.
11. Serve at room temperature or chill for one hour or longer.
